GenAiFunction.description: Runs a Monte Carlo simulation against the current user's open Salesforce Opportunities to answer probability-based revenue questions. Use for: "Will I hit my quota?", "What's my chance of closing $25M this quarter?", "Am I on track for my revenue target?", or any pipeline forecast question. Required input: revenueTarget (the dollar amount as a number, e.g. 25000000 for $25M). Optional input: timeHorizonDays (defaults to end of current quarter). Outputs: summary (plain-English answer to read to the user), targetProbabilityPct (e.g. "68.3%"), expectedRevenue, p10Revenue, p90Revenue, opportunitiesAnalyzed, success.
